title: Token Economy Prototype
summary: The token-economy-prototype Feature replaces the legacy context-usage harness under tests/compliance/context-usage/ with a 2×2 prototype matrix: task-low and task-high crossed with composer-2.5 and gpt-5.5. The harness separates model overhead from task-variable token cost via an additive upper-bound formula, captures…
planning_context: handoff.handoff_note: WP-1 legacy tests/context-usage/ purge complete; canonical root is tests/compliance/context-usage/. Follow-on calibration hardening is inbox-tracked.
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
